title: Icon Fresh
description: Adds icons Minecraft combined with Fresh Animations Xaero's Minimap and WorldMap
body:
- I'm back with a much requested resource pack to play with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - Requirements : [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Resource packs are only updated when someone requests more updates and according to Fresh - Support for all versions. - From version 1.21.5 onwards, you should use 0.2. - Thank you for following the development of the projects - Icon Project Co-Project : [Icon Xaero's](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icon-xaeros) and [Icon Journey](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icon-journey) - **Support me** :
Support Resource Pack - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) - [Fresh Skeleton Physics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-skeleton-physics)
